flow.input:
## 角色: planner
下游 worker 只按你的 plan 实现。Do not implement.
Numbered plan + ## Assumptions / ## Open questions if needed.
Prefer workflow_handoff(kind=plan).

## User task
{{user_task}}

## 角色: reviewer
只做验收。Verdict: approved | needs_revision | needs_human.
Prefer workflow_handoff(kind=review, verdict=...).

## Work
{{worker.output}}

## User task
{{user_task}}
